title: MCLN EX26 Receiving Q&A Enhancements Configuration Guide
fullText: EX 26 – Receiving Question Answer Enhancements Configuration Guide Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1 Foundational Configuration PAGEREF _Toc89347255 \h 3 1.1 Add EX26 System Code PAGEREF _Toc89347256 \h 3 1.2 E26 Custom Code Configuration PAGEREF _Toc89347257 \h 4 1.3 930 System Code Configuration PAGEREF _Toc89347258 \h 5 1.4 Custom ASN Level Perishable Questions Business Activity script PAGEREF _Toc89347259 \h 6 1.5 Questions UI PAGEREF _Toc89347260 \h 6 1.6 Question Answer Determination Rules UI PAGEREF _Toc89347261 \h 17 2 Transaction Configuration PAGEREF _Toc89347262 \h 21 1.7 Add EX26 System Code PAGEREF _Toc89347263 \h 21 Foundational Configuration Add EX 26 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX 26 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save E26 Custom Code Configuration Navigate to System Codes UI Click Add Fill in the following details and click save 930 System Code Configuration Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 930 Select the record and click Code ID s Select an existing Code Id record and click Copy Fill in the following details and click save Custom ASN Level Perishable Questions Business Activity script Run the following SQL script in the environment ’s database \s Restart the WM application Question s UI Navigate to Questions UI Click Add Add the appropriate details for the questions related to Perishable ASNs and click save Here are screenshots of the configured questions in MK environment: Question Answer Determination Rules UI Navigate to Question Answer Determination Rules UI Click Add Criteria Select Receive ASN Level Perishable Questions Business Activity Click Saved Filters and click Apply Fill out the following information and click Save and Apply NOTE: The description can be changed based on business requirements Select Receive ASN level perishable questions Business Activity and click Add Questions Add the questions previously added in the Questions UI for perishable A SNs Click save Here are screenshots of the questions added in the MK environment Transaction Configuration Add EX26 System Code Navigate to Transaction UI and filter for your receiving transaction Select your receiving transaction and click Program Template Click Add to add the custom EX26 transaction Parameter Add the following details and click Save Ensure all the receiving transaction have the custom EX26 transaction parameter set to Yes

chunks.text:
[Document: MCLN EX26 Receiving Q&A Enhancements Configuration Guide]

EX 26 – Receiving Question Answer Enhancements Configuration Guide Contents  1 Foundational Configuration  1.1 Add EX26 System Code  1.2 E26 Custom Code Configuration  1.3 930 System Code Configuration  1.4 Custom ASN Level Perishable Questions Business Activity script  1.5 Questions UI  1.6 Question Answer Determination Rules UI  2 Transaction Configuration  1.7 Add EX26 System Code  Foundational Configuration Add EX 26 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX 26 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save E26 Custom Code Configuration Navigate to System Codes UI Click Add Fill in the following details and click save 930 System Code Configuration Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 930 Select the record and click Code ID s Select an existing Code Id record and click Copy Fill in the following details and click save Custom ASN Level Perishable Questions Business Activity script Run the following SQL script in the environment ’s database  Restart the WM application Question s UI Navigate to Questions UI Click Add Add the appropriate details for the questions related to Perishable ASNs and click save Here are screenshots of the configured questions in MK environment: Question Answer Determination Rules UI Navigate to Question Answer Determination Rules UI Click Add Criteria Select Receive ASN Level Perishable Questions Business Activity Click Saved Filters and click Apply Fill out the following information and click Save and Apply NOTE: The description can be changed based on business requirements Select Receive ASN level perishable questions Business Activity and click Add Questions Add the questions previously added in the Questions UI for perishable A SNs Click save Here are screenshots of the questions added in the MK environment Transaction Configuration Add EX26 System Code Navigate to Transaction UI and filter for your receiving transaction Select your receiving transaction and click Program Template Click Add to add the custom EX26 transaction Parameter Add the following details and click Save Ensure all the receiving transaction have the custom EX26 transaction parameter set to Yes
